tips_en: Start with the third paper on the Textual Frequency Law, as its guidelines for preferring high-frequency textual data underpin both better prompting and fine-tuning strategies for the other two works. The first paper’s process-driven image generation can benefit from high-frequency prompts suggested by the TFL, while the second paper’s SNR-Aware Filtering offers a complementary diagnostic for the RL training of the multimodal model introduced in the first.
tips_zh: 建议先阅读第三篇关于文本频率定律的论文，因为它为文本数据的高频选择提供了基本原则，能直接提升其它两篇工作中的提示和微调效果。第一篇的过程驱动图像生成可以结合高频提示（如TFL所建议）来优化多模态循环，第二篇的SNR感知过滤则为第一篇模型的多轮强化学习训练提供了诊断和缓解推理崩溃的手段。
